blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
